2.4.6-headings-and-labels.remarks: atomic-tab-manager tablist aria-label is 'tab-area' — a non-descriptive technical placeholder that does not describe the topic or purpose of the tabs. See KIT-5805. All other components pass: facets use descriptive headings and labeled inputs, search box has descriptive aria-label, smart snippets/generated answer use descriptive section labels, pager/sort/results-per-page have descriptive group labels, refine-modal uses descriptive headings.
